steps.title: Set up the cost inequality
steps.content:
Let $a$ be the number of attendees. The total cost is the one-time venue fee plus the per-attendee cost:
$$35 + 10.25a \leq 300$$

steps.title: Solve for the maximum integer value
steps.content:
Subtract 35:
$$10.25a \leq 265$$
Divide by 10.25 (which is $\frac{41}{4}$):
$$a \leq \frac{265 \times 4}{41} = \frac{1060}{41}$$
Since $41 \times 25 = 1025$ and $1060 - 1025 = 35$, we have $a \leq 25 + \frac{35}{41} \approx 25.85$
The number of attendees must be a whole number, so the greatest value is 25. Verify: $35 + 10.25(25) = 291.25 \leq 300$ ✓
